__comment: Memory pipeline configuration. Seeded automatically on first install — edit via /mixdog:config or directly in the data directory.

user.__comment: Optional user identity seeded into core memory so recall can personalise responses.

cycle1.__comment: Chunker cycle — groups raw conversation entries into labelled memory chunks.

cycle2.__comment: Curator cycle — promotes high-value chunks to active core memory and prunes stale entries.

recap.__comment: Session recap — entries injected as additionalContext on SessionStart (startup|clear). chunk_count caps how many recent root chunks + recent raw turns are pulled from the memory DB.
